<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get all ACH transactions for a company"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/companies/{company_uuid}/ach_transactions"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Fetches all ACH transactions for a company.

scope: `ach_transactions:read`
